summary: Iteration 147: Decisions Page UX Refonte - Grouping by Appointment. All tests PASSED (13/13 backend, 100% frontend). Verified that decisions are grouped by appointment_id: 7 decisions displayed in 5 groups. Groups with multiple decisions show badge (e.g., '2 decisions'). Unread indicators working (blue dot on sub-cards, blue background on groups). Detail page navigation and mark-as-read working. Financial impact correctly computed per user role (credit for organizer, debit for participant).

backend_api_tests.test_decisions_have_appointment_id: PASS - All decisions have appointment_id for grouping
backend_api_tests.test_decisions_have_required_fields: PASS - All required fields present (dispute_id, appointment_title, target_name, final_outcome, financial_impact)
backend_api_tests.test_appointment_location_fields: PASS - Location fields present for all appointments
backend_api_tests.test_final_outcome_values: PASS - All outcomes are valid (on_time, no_show, late_penalized)

notification_api_tests.test_mark_read_endpoint: PASS - Mark read endpoint exists and is idempotent

frontend_tests.badge_on_multi_decision_groups: PASS - 'Cinema' and 'test dispute' show '2 decisions' badge
frontend_tests.no_badge_on_single_decision_groups: PASS - Single-decision groups have no badge
frontend_tests.appointment_context_displayed: PASS - Title, date/time, location shown on group cards
frontend_tests.global_financial_impact: PASS - Groups show 'Aucune penalite', '+0EUR recu', 'Impact mixte', '10EUR debite'
frontend_tests.sub_card_elements: PASS - Participant name, outcome badge, individual financial impact shown
frontend_tests.detail_page_elements: PASS - Outcome bloc, financial bloc, declarations bloc, status present
frontend_tests.back_button: PASS - Back button returns to decisions list
frontend_tests.participant_view: PASS - Participant sees same grouping with role-specific financial impact
frontend_tests.unread_indicators: PASS - Blue dots on unread sub-cards, blue background on groups with unread

critical_code_review_comments: DecisionsListPage.js: Clean implementation with 3 components (DecisionsListPage, AppointmentDecisionCard, DecisionSubCard)
groupByAppointment(): Uses Map for O(n) grouping by appointment_id
getGlobalImpact(): Correctly computes mixed/credit/debit/neutral based on all decisions in group
Unread indicators: hasUnread computed from unreadIds Set, blue-50 background applied to group
Sub-card unread dot: data-testid='unread-dot-{dispute_id}' for individual unread indicator
Financial impact labels: Role-aware (organizer sees credit, participant sees debit)
DecisionDetailPage.js: Marks notification as read on mount via notificationAPI.markRead()
seed_data_creation: None - used existing decisions data (7 decisions across 5 appointments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decisions page UX refonte complete. Frontend groups decisions by appointment_id using a Map. 7 decisions are displayed in 5 groups: 'Cinema' (2), 'test presence physique' (1), 'test email wordin' (1), 'test dispute' (2), 'rdv swith tet' (1). Groups with multiple decisions show badge. Unread indicators work (blue dot + blue background). Detail page marks notification as read. Financial impact is role-aware (credit for organizer, debit for participant). Same pattern as DisputesListPage.js.

unread_indicators.participant_view: 4 unread dots visible, 2 groups with blue background
